{{Infobox character
| name = Blade Dancer
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Blade Dancer]] is a young [[Visiri]] woman and a member of the High [[Council]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Blade Dancer]] is a [[High Councilor]] at [[Advocate headquarters]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Dancer won a vote.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
